HackthePlanetDesc: If true, Computers, Vending Machines, Confession Booths, Arcade Machines, Pachinko Machines, and Ice Machines, that are connected to a network and powered, can be hacked.
ReinitializeDesc: If true, access points will reset themselves to be hacked again.
EnableDebugLogDesc: If true, debug messages will appear in scripting.log. Only turn on when diagnosing issues.
